title: iTunes - Installation Troubleshooting
body: Macintosh iTunes is a part of Mac OS X, and is located in your Application folder. If you have removed iTunes from your system, you can download it at http://www.apple.com/itunes/download/ . Windows Windows users can download iTunes at http://www.apple.com/itunes/download/ . If you have problems with the installation, use the links below to troubleshoot your problems. Installation Troubleshooting for Windows: http://support.apple.com/kb/HT1926 Error 7: https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT204770
